Gender Equality.reason: Course is co-ed, promoting gender inclusivity in sports.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course is dedicated to physical activity to "develop good exercise habits," directly promoting well-being and preventing non-communicable diseases, aligning with Target 3.4.

強化田徑運動所需要的基礎能力 (strengthen the basic abilities needed for track and field)

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides tertiary education (Target 4.3) and teaches specific physical skills through "technical practice," contributing to skill development (Target 4.4).
evidence: 技術練習、測驗 (technical practice, tests)

Gender Equality.reason: The course is explicitly for both "male and female" (男女合班), ensuring equal access and participation in physical education, which supports Target 5.1 on ending discrimination.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course promotes social inclusion by being open to both "male and female" (男女合班), supporting Target 10.2 which aims to include all, irrespective of sex.
